stripe_buy_links.action: Set STRIPE_BUY_LINK_LITE, _MONTHLY, _STARTER, _PRO, _OEM, _LICENSING in Replit Secrets or CF Workers env
stripe_buy_links.impact: /buy command and /enter checkout_url return null until set

r2_originus_binding.action: In CF Workers dashboard, bind bucket 'originus' to sentinel-fortune-ecosystem as ORIGINUS_R2
r2_originus_binding.impact: GET /api/status/:id falls back to local data/ files; R2 reads fail silently

official_logo_png.impact: SVG placeholder currently showing in nav — works but not final brand mark

cf_pages_deployment.action: Connect GitHub repo to Cloudflare Pages, build: 'cd artifacts/sentinel-app && pnpm run build', output: 'artifacts/sentinel-app/dist/public'
cf_pages_deployment.impact: Frontend currently runs on Replit dev server only

stripe_link_env_vars_for_cf_worker.action: Set STRIPE_BUY_LINK_* as CF Worker env vars in cloudflare/wrangler-api.toml secrets
stripe_link_env_vars_for_cf_worker.impact: CF api-worker.js buy endpoint returns 503 until set

pdf_generation.action: Implement /api/builders/deal_pdf_builder/invoke with actual PDF generation (puppeteer or @react-pdf/renderer)
pdf_generation.impact: Builder registry entry exists; PDF generation not yet wired

builders_api_endpoint.action: Adding /api/builders routes to Express API in this session
builders_api_endpoint.impact: Builders were registry-only; now becoming callable endpoints
